disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Years of recurrent deep flexural lumps with tunnels (sinus tracts), scarring and double-comedones in armpits/groin
trigger_question_examples: Have you had recurrent deep lumps in the armpits/groin for years, with tunnels and scarring?
Is this a long-standing recurring problem in skin-fold areas?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, for about 5 years I've had recurring deep lumps in both armpits and the groin, with tunnels and scars.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No rapidly spreading hot redness down the arm/chest and no high fever/rigors (superimposed cellulitis/sepsis screen)
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness rapidly spreading down your arm or across your chest, or do you have a high fever/shakes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, the redness isn't spreading down my arm and I don't have a high fever or shakes — it's just the armpit.
